1.name: Romance Dawn
1.description: Luffy begins his journey, becomes a pirate, and forms the initial crew while facing their first challenges.

2.name: Orange Town
2.description: Luffy and Zoro arrive at Orange Town, meet Nami, and fight to free the town from Buggy the Clown.

3.name: Syrup Village
3.description: The crew searches for a ship and meets Usopp while facing the Black Cat Pirates.

4.name: Baratie
4.description: The group visits a floating restaurant seeking a cook; Sanji joins and conflict with Don Krieg erupts.

5.name: Arlong Park
5.description: Nami's past is revealed as they confront Arlong's rule over her homeland.

6.name: Buggy Side Story (Filler)
6.description: Side story showing Buggy and his crew with lighthearted and humorous moments.

7.name: Loguetown
7.description: Last stop before the Grand Line: Loguetown brings confrontations before the great voyage.

8.name: Warship Island (Filler)
8.description: Filler arc where Luffy and his crew help a mysterious girl while facing pirates and hidden secrets.

9.name: Reverse Mountain/Laboon
9.description: The crew enters the Grand Line, faces the currents, and discovers Laboon, a giant whale with a mysterious bond.

10.name: Whisky Peak
10.description: The Straw Hats arrive at a festive town hiding dangerous secrets and unexpected enemies.

11.name: Koby and Helmeppo (Filler)
11.description: Short arc focused on Koby and Helmeppo, showing their development as marines.

12.name: Little Garden
12.description: The crew explores a prehistoric island with two warrior giants and enormous creatures.

13.name: Drum Island
13.description: The Straw Hats seek a doctor on a frozen island, facing illness and local mysteries.

14.name: Alabasta
14.description: Luffy and company help Vivi and the kingdom of Alabasta stop a war provoked by Crocodile.

15.name: Post-Alabasta
15.description: The crew reflects on Alabasta and prepares for the next stage of the Grand Line.

16.name: Goat Island (Filler)
16.description: Filler arc on a quiet island inhabited by goats with comic situations.

17.name: Ruluka Island (Filler)
17.description: Filler following the Straw Hats on a mysterious island with peculiar inhabitants.

18.name: Jaya
18.description: The crew reaches Jaya, discovering New World secrets and clues about ancient civilizations.

19.name: Skypiea
19.description: The Straw Hats ascend to the sky island, facing divine conflicts and ancestral trials.

20.name: G-8 (Filler)
20.description: Filler set in a heavily guarded marine base where the crew infiltrates and faces challenges.

21.name: Long Ring Long Land
21.description: The crew faces Foxy in a game of challenges and tricks testing wit and endurance.

22.name: Ocean's Dream (Filler)
22.description: Filler where the crew temporarily loses memory with comic adventures.

23.name: Foxy's Return (Filler)
23.description: Filler showing Foxy’s return and a new showdown with the crew.

24.name: Water 7
24.description: The crew arrives at Water 7, facing political tensions while seeking a new ship.

25.name: Enies Lobby
25.description: A bold rescue mission against the World Government; the crew faces powerful enemies.

26.name: Post-Enies Lobby
26.description: After Enies Lobby, the crew recovers and prepares for the next stage.

27.name: Ice Hunter (Filler)
27.description: Filler where the crew faces bounty hunters during their travels.

28.name: Thriller Bark
28.description: The Straw Hats reach a mysterious island of ghosts and zombies facing supernatural dangers.

29.name: Spa Island (Filler)
29.description: Short filler where the crew visits a spa island with lighthearted situations.

30.name: Sabaody Archipelago
30.description: Gateway to the New World: the Straw Hats face powerful forces and natural barriers.

31.name: Amazon Lily
31.description: Luffy reaches an island of warrior women while searching for Ace.

32.name: Impel Down
32.description: Luffy tries to infiltrate the most feared prison to save a loved one.

33.name: Little East Blue (Filler)
33.description: Filler where the crew recalls past adventures before reuniting for new challenges.

34.name: Marineford
34.description: An epic battle between pirates, marines, and allies that changes the world.

35.name: Post-War
35.description: The world after Marineford, with wounds, losses, and new directions for the crew.

36.name: Return to Sabaody
36.description: After the time skip, the Straw Hats return to Sabaody to reunite and resume their journey.

37.name: Fish-Man Island
37.description: Undersea exploration, forgotten cultures, and confrontations revealing deep truths.

38.name: Z's Ambition (Filler)
38.description: Filler where the crew faces a mysterious villain while heading to the New World.

39.name: Punk Hazard
39.description: The crew reaches an island split between fire and ice, facing dangerous experiments.

40.name: Caesar Retrieval (Filler)
40.description: Filler where the Straw Hats try to rescue Caesar Clown amid comic obstacles.

41.name: Dressrosa
41.description: Fight against a corrupt lord who manipulated an entire kingdom.

42.name: Silver Mine (Filler)
42.description: Filler where the crew faces thieves and traps in a mine.

43.name: Zou
43.description: The crew reaches the elephant island, discovers Poneglyph secrets, and prepares for new challenges.

44.name: Marine Rookie (Filler)
44.description: Filler where the Straw Hats infiltrate a minor marine base.

45.name: Whole Cake Island
45.description: Sanji is separated and the crew enters Big Mom’s territory facing deadly challenges.

46.name: Levely
46.description: World congress where great powers gather amid rising political tensions.

47.name: Wano Country (Part 1)
47.description: The crew arrives at Wano, an isolated samurai country, and discovers its traditions.

48.name: Cidre Guild (Filler)
48.description: Filler where the crew faces a group of criminals in the New World.

49.name: Wano Country (Part 2)
49.description: The crew continues fighting the Shogun’s allies and plans to defeat the main enemy.

50.name: Uta's Past (Filler)
50.description: Filler exploring Uta’s memories and past before current Wano events.

51.name: Wano Country (Part 3)
51.description: The final battle in Wano intensifies with epic confrontations and crucial revelations.

1.name: I'm Luffy! The Man Who's Gonna Be King of the Pirates!
1.description: A mysterious young man emerges from a barrel in the middle of the ocean. When a cruise ship is attacked by Alvida's pirates, he meets Coby, who dreams of becoming a marine.

2.name: Enter the Great Swordsman! Pirate Hunter Roronoa Zoro!
2.description: Luffy and Coby reach Shell Town and meet the famous pirate hunter Roronoa Zoro, held prisoner by the corrupt Captain Morgan.

3.name: Morgan vs. Luffy! Who's This Beautiful Young Woman?
3.description: Luffy and Zoro face the tyrannical Captain Morgan in Shell Town. A mysterious thief watches the battle from the shadows.

4.name: Luffy's Past! The Red-Haired Shanks Appears!
4.description: A flashback reveals how Luffy gained his powers and straw hat through his childhood with Shanks. The crew reaches Orange Town.

5.name: A Terrifying Mysterious Power! Captain Buggy, the Clown Pirate!
5.description: The crew faces Buggy the Clown, a dangerous Devil Fruit pirate terrorizing Orange Town.

6.name: Desperate Situation! Beast Tamer Mohji vs. Luffy!
6.description: Luffy protects a loyal dog and its pet food shop while fighting beast tamer Mohji and his lion Richie.

7.name: Epic Showdown! Swordsman Zoro vs. Acrobat Cabaji!
7.description: Zoro proves his swordsmanship against acrobat Cabaji of Buggy's crew despite being injured.

8.name: Who's the Lucky One? The Devil Fruit Power Showdown!
8.description: Final showdown between Luffy and Buggy as Devil Fruit powers clash and Orange Town's fate is decided.

9.name: The Honorable Liar? Captain Usopp!
9.description: The crew reaches Syrup Village seeking a ship and meets Usopp, a young liar telling fantastical stories to the village children.

10.name: The Weirdest Guy Ever! Jango the Hypnotist!
10.description: A strange hypnotist named Jango arrives. A conspiracy involving Kaya's butler and a sinister plan is revealed.

11.name: Expose the Plot! Pirate Butler, Captain Kuro!
11.description: Klahadore is revealed to be the feared Captain Kuro. Usopp discovers the plan to kill Kaya and steal her fortune.

12.name: Clash with the Black Cat Pirates! The Great Battle on the Slope!
12.description: The decisive battle begins on the north slope as the Straw Hats and Usopp face the Black Cat Pirates.

13.name: The Terrifying Duo! Meowban Brothers vs. Zoro!
13.description: Zoro fights the Meowban Brothers Sham and Buchi while Luffy and the others battle the rest of the pirate crew.

14.name: Luffy Back in Action! Miss Kaya's Desperate Resistance!
14.description: Luffy recovers from Jango's hypnosis. Kaya tries to resist threats as the battle intensifies.

15.name: Beat Kuro! Usopp the Man's Tearful Resolve!
15.description: Usopp finds courage to face his fears and defend the village, preparing for the final confrontation with Kuro.

16.name: Protect Kaya! The Usopp Pirates' Great Efforts!
16.description: Usopp's friends Onion, Pepper, and Carrot do everything to protect Kaya from the invading pirates.

17.name: Anger Explosion! Kuro vs. Luffy! How It Ends!
17.description: The final confrontation between Luffy and Captain Kuro decides the village's fate and Kaya's safety.

18.name: You're the Weird One! Jango vs. Usopp!
18.description: Final showdown between Usopp and Jango as Usopp proves his marksmanship in a decisive battle.

19.name: The Three-Sword Style's Past! Zoro and Kuina's Vow!
19.description: Flashback to Zoro's past and his vow with childhood friend Kuina, revealing why he became a swordsman.

20.name: Famous Cook! Sanji of the Sea Restaurant!
20.description: The crew reaches the floating restaurant Baratie and meets Sanji, a cook dreaming of finding the All Blue.

21.name: Unwelcome Customer! Sanji's Food and Ghin's Debt!
21.description: A hungry pirate named Gin tests Baratie's principle of feeding anyone in need.

22.name: The Strongest Pirate Fleet! Commodore Don Krieg!
22.description: Don Krieg, leader of the East Blue's largest pirate fleet, arrives at Baratie intending to conquer the restaurant.

23.name: Protect Baratie! The Great Pirate, Red Foot Zeff!
23.description: Zeff's past as the pirate Red Leg and his connection to Sanji through a tragedy at sea is revealed.

24.name: Hawk-Eye Mihawk! The Great Swordsman vs. Pirate Hunter Zoro!
24.description: Dracule Mihawk, the world's strongest swordsman, arrives at Baratie seeking Zoro for an epic duel.

25.name: The Emerge of the Deadly Weapon! Zoro's New Special Attack!
25.description: Zoro unleashes a new special technique in his desperate battle against the world's most powerful swordsman.

26.name: Zoro's Vow to His Captain! I'll Never Lose Again!
26.description: After his crushing defeat by Mihawk, Zoro makes a solemn promise to Luffy that will define his future.

27.name: Cool-headed, Cold-hearted Demon! Pirate Fleet Chief Commander Ghin!
27.description: Gin struggles between loyalty to Don Krieg and gratitude toward Sanji.

28.name: I Won't Die! Fierce Battle, Luffy vs. Krieg!
28.description: The decisive battle between Luffy and Don Krieg begins while Gin sacrifices himself to save Luffy from poison gas.

29.name: The Conclusion of the Deadly Battle! A Spear of Blind Determination!
29.description: The final battle between Luffy and Don Krieg reaches its climax with Luffy's Gomu Gomu no Bazooka.

30.name: Set Sail! The Seafaring Cook Sets off With Luffy!
30.description: After the battle, Sanji joins Luffy's crew to pursue his All Blue dream and bids an emotional farewell to Baratie and Zeff.

31.name: The Worst Man in the Eastern Seas! Fishman Pirate Arlong!
31.description: The crew learns Nami left with the Going Merry. Johnny and Yosaku bring news of Nami and the fish-man pirates led by Arlong.

32.name: Witch of Cocoyashi Village! Arlong's Female Leader!
32.description: Zoro and Usopp follow Nami to her hometown and discover she works for the fish-men as the "witch" who draws maps for Arlong.

33.name: Usopp Dead?! When is Luffy Going to Make Landfall?!
33.description: Usopp is defeated by Arlong's men while Luffy and Sanji sail toward Cocoyashi guided by Yosaku.

34.name: Everyone's Gathered! Usopp Speaks the Truth About Nami!
34.description: Usopp reveals Nami's tragic story and why she works for Arlong. The crew gathers to learn the truth about their navigator.

35.name: Untold Past! Female Warrior Bellemere!
35.description: Flashback revealing Nami's past: how retired marine Bell-mère found her as a baby and raised her with Nojiko.

36.name: Survive! Mother Bellemere and Nami's Bond!
36.description: The flashback continues as Arlong arrives, kills Bell-mère, and Nami agrees to work for him to save the villagers.

37.name: Luffy Rises! Result of the Broken Promise!
37.description: Arlong breaks his promise using corrupt marine Nezumi. When Nami finally asks for help, Luffy gives her his straw hat.

38.name: Luffy in Big Trouble! Fishmen vs. the Luffy Pirates!
38.description: Battle begins at Arlong Park as the Straw Hats face fish-man pirates while Luffy is trapped underwater.

39.name: Luffy Submerged! Zoro vs. Hatchan the Octopus!
39.description: Zoro faces octopus swordsman Hatchan in a six-sword versus three duel while Luffy remains trapped underwater.

40.name: Proud Warriors! Sanji and Usopp's Fierce Battles!
40.description: Sanji fights Kuroobi in the water while Usopp faces karateka Chu with his slingshot and wit.

41.name: Luffy at Full Power! Nami's Determination and the Straw Hat!
41.description: Genzo and Nojiko save Luffy from the water. Nami confronts her past and declares she wants to keep living.

42.name: Explosion! Fishman Arlong's Fierce Assault From the Sea!
42.description: Arlong shows his true fish-man power with superhuman strength and shark teeth against Luffy.

43.name: End of the Fishman Empire! Nami's My Friend!
43.description: Luffy destroys the room where Nami was forced to draw maps, proclaiming she is his nakama, and defeats Arlong.

44.name: Departure! Farewell to the Brave Cocoyashi Village!
44.description: The villagers celebrate freedom. Nami officially leaves her hometown and joins the Straw Hats as navigator.

45.name: Bounty! Straw Hat Luffy Becomes Known to the World!
45.description: Corrupt marine Nezumi reports Luffy. His first bounty of 30,000,000 berries makes him an officially wanted pirate.

46.name: Chase Straw Hat! Little Buggy's Big Adventure!
46.description: Special episode following Buggy's adventures after his defeat as he seeks revenge against Luffy.

47.name: You've Been Waiting For It! The Return of Captain Buggy!
47.description: Buggy's adventures continue as the clown pirate seeks revenge while rebuilding his crew.

48.name: The Town of the Beginning and the End! Landfall at Logue Town!
48.description: The Straw Hats reach Logue Town, where Pirate King Gol D. Roger was born and executed — their last stop before the Grand Line.

49.name: Kitetsu III and Yubashiri! Zoro's New Swords and the Woman Sergeant Major!
49.description: Zoro seeks new katanas in Logue Town, meets Tashigi, and obtains Sandai Kitetsu and Yubashiri.

50.name: Usopp vs. Daddy the Father! Showdown at High Noon!
50.description: Usopp faces famous sharpshooter Daddy Masterson in a high-noon duel.

51.name: Fiery Cooking Battle? Sanji vs. the Beautiful Chef!
51.description: Sanji competes in a cooking battle against beautiful chef Carmen.

52.name: Buggy's Revenge! The Man Who Smiles On the Execution Platform!
52.description: Buggy tries to publicly execute Luffy on the same platform where Roger died. A mysterious storm saves Luffy.

53.name: The Legend Has Started! Head for the Grand Line!
53.description: The Straw Hats escape Logue Town as Smoker pursues them, heading toward the Grand Line.

54.name: Precursor to a New Adventure! Apis, a Mysterious Girl!
54.description: The Straw Hats rescue Apis, a mysterious girl who can talk to animals and is fleeing the Marines.

55.name: Miraculous Creature! Apis's Secret and the Legendary Island!
55.description: Apis reveals she can communicate with millennium dragon Ryuji. Pirates and Marines seek the legendary dragon island.

56.name: Eric Attacks! Great Escape from Warship Island!
56.description: Eric attacks Warship Island seeking Dragonite. The Straw Hats help villagers evacuate while protecting Apis and the elder dragon.

57.name: Lone Island in a Distant Sea! The Legendary Lost Island!
57.description: The search for Lost Island continues as Ryuji guides them toward the ancestral home of millennium dragons.

58.name: Duel in the Ruins! Tense Zoro vs. Eric!
58.description: Zoro faces Eric in the ruins of Lost Island in an intense blade versus wind-scythe battle.

59.name: Luffy, Completely Surrounded! Admiral Nelson's Secret Strategy!
59.description: Luffy falls into Nelson's trap surrounded by the Marine fleet as Admiral Nelson reveals his plan.

60.name: Those Who Soar in the Open Sky! Revival of the 1000 Year Legend!
60.description: Ryuji finds fellow dragons on Lost Island and regains vitality as millennium dragons fly together once more.

61.name: An Angry Showdown! Cross the Red Line!
61.description: Final East Blue episode. The Straw Hats bid farewell to Apis and cross the Red Line into the Grand Line.
